name: Artifact Expert: Lich Bane
desc: Get a 2* Sona , a Lich Bane, and a Tear Of The Goddess

name: Artifact Expert: Luden's Tempest
desc: Get a 2* Caitlyn , a Luden's Tempest, and a Recurve Bow

name: Artifact Expert: Manazane
desc: Get a 2* Anivia, a Manazane , and a Tear Of The Goddess

name: Artifact Expert: Zhonya's Paradox
desc: Get a 2* Milio, a Zhonya's Paradox, and a Negatron Cloak

name: Artifact Expert: Fishbones
desc: Get a 2* Ashe, a Fishbones, and a Sparring Gloves

name: Artifact Expert: Deathfire Grasp
desc: Get a 2* Kog'Maw, a Deathfire Grasp, and a Recurve Bow

name: Artifact Expert: Flickerblade
desc: Get an Aphelios, a Flickerblade, and a Recurve Bow

name: Artifact Expert: Hullbreaker
desc: Get a 2* Xin Zhao, a Hullbreaker, and a Chain Vest

name: Artifact Expert: Blighting Jewel
desc: Get a Teemo, a Blighting Jewel, and a Needlessly Large Rod

name: Artifact Expert: The Indomitable
desc: Get a Sion, The Indomitable, and a Giant Belt.

name: Artifact Expert: Innervating Locket
desc: Get a 2* Illaoi, a Innervating Locket, and a Giant Belt

name: Artifact Expert: Dawncore
desc: Get a Teemo, a Dawncore, and a Tear Of The Goddess

name: Artifact Expert: Prowler's Claw
desc: Get a 2* RekSai, a Prowler's Claw, and a Sparring Gloves

name: Artifact Expert: Titanic Hydra
desc: Get a 2* Briar, a Titanic Hydra , and a B.F. Sword

name: Artifact Expert: Spectral Cutlass
desc: Get a 2* Yasuo, a Spectral Cutlass, and a Sparring Gloves

name: Artifact Expert: Talisman Of Ascension
desc: Get a 2* Zac, a Talisman Of Ascension, and a Giant Belt

name: Artifact Expert: Horizon Focus
desc: Get a Cho'Gath, a Horizon Focus, and a Needlessly Large Rod

name: Artifact Expert: Sniper's Focus
desc: Get a 2* Tristana , a Sniper's Focus, and a B.F. Sword

name: Artifact Expert: Wits End
desc: Get a 2* Viego, a Wits End, and a Needlessly Large Rod

name: Artifact Expert: Lightshield Crest
desc: Get a 2* Neeko, a Lightshield Crest, and a Chain Vest

name: Shiv Expert: Twisted Fate
desc: Get a Twisted Fate, a Statikk Shiv, and a Needlessly Large Rod.

name: Artifact Expert: Unending Despair
desc: Get a 2* Rumble, a Unending Despair, and a Negatron Cloak

name: Artifact Expert: Seeker's Armguard
desc: Get a 2* Ekko, a Seeker's Armguard, and a Needlessly Large Rod

name: Artifact Item
desc: After @Delay@ rounds, gain a random Artifact.

name: God Artifact Anvil
desc: Drag this to the Shop to open an Armory full of God Artifact items! You will have 30 seconds to choose.

name: Artifact Item
desc: After @Delay@ rounds, gain a random Artifact.

name: Zeke's Bleak Herald
desc: When combat begins, the holder <TFTShadowItemPenalty>reduces the Attack Speed of all allies within @HexRange@ hexes in the same row by %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeedReduction@%.</TFTShadowItemPenalty> <TFTShadowItemBonus>The holder then gains %i:scaleAS% @AttackSpeed@% Attack Speed for each affected ally.</TFTShadowItemBonus>

name: Spend 22 gold. Gain an Artifact anvil.
Lesser Mirrored Persona
desc:
Share @StatSharePercent*100@% of the holder's bonus Attack Damage, Ability Power, Attack Speed, Armor, Magic Resist, and Health with other Mirrored Persona holders.

Can't be Reforged
Unique: one per champion

name: Innervating Locket
desc:
The holder gains @PercentMana@% of their total Mana whenever they're hit by an attack.

Each cast restores @PercentHealth@% of the holder's max Health over @Duration@ seconds.

name: The Indomitable
desc:
The holder's Move Speed is drastically reduced.

Gain @HealthPercBonus*100@% max Health, stun immunity, and pull the current target into melee range.

name: Shadow Puppet
desc:
Spawn a clone that copies the holder's items. The clone has @ClonePercentHealth*100@% max Health and deals @ClonePercentDamage*100@% damage.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Ekko's Patience
desc: Total Ability damage is increased by @AbilityDA*100@%, but is dealt over @Duration@ seconds instead.

name: Withered Relic
desc: Combat Start: Increase the holder's max Health by @FlatMaxHealth@ but keep their current Health the same.

name: Eternal Pact
desc:
Combat start: Form a pact with the highest Health allied champion, if they die, gain @ManaRegenToGrant@ Mana regen and @APToGrant@% Ability Power.

When the ally uses their ability, gain @ManaToGrant@ Mana. Every @ShieldCadence@ seconds, shield your ally for @PercentAPShield*100@% of the holder's Ability Power.

name: Hellfire Hatchet
desc: Attacks deal @MaxHealthPercentDamage*100@% of the holder's max Health as bonus physical damage. For every @MissingHealthPercent*100@% missing Health, gain @ASPerMissingHealthPercent*100@% Attack Speed.

name: Lich Bane
desc:
The holder's first attack after each Ability cast deals @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_LichBane_Damage@ bonus magic damage.

Damage increases based on Stage.

name: Forbidden Idol
desc: Shields have @PercentShieldConversion@% of their value converted to max Health instead.

name: Mirrored Persona
desc:
Every @NumCombats@ player combats gain a lesser copy of Mirrored Persona (@TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT_Item_Artifact_MirroredPersona_Combats@/@NumCombats@).

Share @StatSharePercent*100@% of the holder's bonus Attack Damage, Ability Power, Attack Speed, Armor, Magic Resist, and Health with other Mirrored Persona holders.

Can't be Reforged, Lesser copies do not produce copies.
Unique: one per champion

name: Fishbones
desc: The holder's attacks target random enemies.

name: Titanic Hydra
desc: Attacks deal @PercentMaxHealthSplash@% of the holder's max Health plus @PercentAttackDamageSplash@% of their Attack Damage as bonus physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies.

name: Aegis of Dusk
desc:
Every @TickRate@ seconds, steal @MRStealPerTick@ Magic Resist from enemies within 1 hex and deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisDuskDawn_Damage@% of the holder's Magic Resist as magic damage.

If Aegis of Dawn is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every @TickRateWithAegisOfDawn@ seconds instead.

Damage increases based on Stage.

name: Unending Despair
desc: Whenever a Shield on the holder breaks, @PercentDamage@% of that Shield's initial value is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

name: Yasuo's Bladework
desc: Every @Interval@ seconds, your next attack is a double attack.

name: Mending Echoes
desc: Increase healing on the holder by @IncreasedHealing*100@%. When the holder gives or receives a heal, grant @HealPercentToGrant*100@% of the heals value to the lowest health ally as well.

name: Thresh's Lantern
desc:
After @Delay@ seconds of combat, pull the leftmost benched unit onto the battlefield. While that unit lives, @DamageShare*100@% of all damage the holder would take is redirected to them.

Traits of champions flung onto the board do not become active

name: Kayle's Radiant Exaltation
desc: Behold, the righteous flame!

name: Kayle's Exaltation
desc: After @Delay@ seconds of combat, this and all completed items on the holder become Radiant.

name: Cursed Blade
desc: Attacks reduce the target's max Health by @MaxHealthPercent@%. @HitCount@ attacks on the same target reduces their star level by 1.

name: Luden's Tempest
desc: @PercentOfOverkill@% of overkill damage plus @BaseDamage@ is dealt as magic damage to the two enemies nearest to the target.

name: Spectral Cutlass
desc: Combat start: Teleport the holder to the mirrored hex on the enemy's side of the board. After @Duration@ seconds, the holder returns to their original location.

name: Rapid Firecannon
desc: Gain +1 Attack Range, increased by 1 whenever the holder kills an enemy.

name: Statikk Shiv
desc: Every 3rd attack deals @Damage@ + @APScalar*100@% of the holder's Ability Power as additional magic damage to 4 enemies.

name: Aegis of Dawn
desc:
Every @TickRate@ seconds, steal @ArmorStealPerTick@ Armor from enemies within 1-hex and heal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_AegisDuskDawn_Damage@% of the holder's Armor.

If Aegis of Dusk is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every @TickRateWithAegisOfDusk@ seconds instead.

Healing increases based on Stage.

name: Evelynn's Instinct
desc:
When switching targets, blink to the next target. Attacks and Abilities execute the holder's target below @ExecuteThresholdForTarget*100@% of their Health.

Kills grant the holder @DecayingAS*100@% Attack Speed decaying over @Duration@ seconds.

name: Soraka's Miracle
desc:
The first @NumMiracles@ times the holder drops below @HPThreshold*100@% Health, a Miracle occurs, healing them for @TotalHealRatio@% of their max Health.

If the holder survives player combat, gain @PlayerHealth@ player Health for each Miracle this combat.

name: Varus's Obsession
desc:
Combat Start: Your strongest Tank becomes the Soulmate. For each second they are alive, the holder gains @StackingStats@% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.

The Soulmate heals for @HealPct*100@% of damage the holder deals.

name: Dawncore
desc: Reduce the holder's max Mana by @FlatManaReduction@. Subsequent spellcasts reduce max Mana by @ReductionPerCast*100@%, to a minimum of @MinimumTotalMana@.

name: Choncc's Artifactory
desc: At the start of each turn, your benched completed items transform into a random Artifact item. Gain @NumItems@ Artifact Anvil and a reforger.

name: Ahri's Aura
desc:
The holder is orbited by 3 foxfires. Each one deals @FlatMagicDamage@ (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the holder's current target.

For every @ManaSpent@ Mana the holder spends, foxfires travel @PercentSpeedIncrease*100@% faster for the rest of combat.

name: Lightshield Crest
desc:
Every @TriggerRate@ seconds, Shields the lowest percent Health ally for @PercentOfResists@% of the holder's combined Armor and Magic Resist for @ShieldDuration@ seconds.

On death grants this shield to all allies.

name: Blighting Jewel
desc:
Dealing magic damage reduces the target's Magic Resist by @MRReduction@. If their Magic Resist is 0, grant the holder @ManaGain@ Mana instead.

Ability damage can only trigger on each enemy once every @ICD@ seconds.

name: Talisman Of Ascension
desc: After @Seconds@ seconds gain @MaxHealthPercent@% max Health and @DamageAmp*100@% Damage Amp for the rest of combat.

name: Suspicious Trench Coat
desc:
Once per combat at @PercentHealthTrigger@% Health, the holder splits into 3 copies of themself each with @PercentHealthOfCopies@% of their max Health.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Mittens
desc:
Shrinks the holder, granting them increased movement speed and immunity to Slow, Burn, and Wound.

{{TFT_Keyword_Chill}}
{{TFT_Keyword_Burn}}
{{TFT_Keyword_Wound}}

name: Flickerblades
desc: Attacks grant @ASPerStack*100@% stacking Attack Speed. Every @StacksPerBonus@ attacks also grant @ADPerBonus*100@% Attack Damage and @APPerBonus@% Ability Power.

name: Corrupt Vampiric Scepter
desc:
Attacks deal an additional @PercentDamage@% Attack Damage %i:scaleAD% as physical damage and heal the holder for the damage dealt.

The holder cannot cast their Ability or gain Mana.

name: Wit's End
desc:
Attacks deal @TFTUnitProperty.item:TFT_Item_Artifact_WitsEnd_Damage@ bonus magic damage.

Heals the holder for @PercentHealing@% of all magic damage dealt.

Damage increases based on Stage.

name: Horizon Focus
desc: Stunning an enemy causes lightning to strike them, dealing @PercentHealthDamage@% of their max Health as magic damage.

name: Prowler's Claw
desc: After killing a target, shed negative effects and dash to the farthest target within @HexRange@ hexes. The next 2 critical attacks deal @CritDamageBonusPercent@% bonus Critical Strike Damage.

name: Void Gauntlet
desc:
Combat start: Store @InitialPercentHealthStore*100@% max Health and @PercentHealthStore*100@% more every second. On death, unleash the stored Health as magic damage split between enemies within @HexRadius@-hexes.

[Unique - only 1 per champion]

name: Silvermere Dawn
desc:
Grants immunity to Stuns and the holder's attacks Stun the target for @StunDuration@ seconds.

The holder's Attack Speed is locked at @AttackSpeedCap@.

name: Seeker's Armguard
desc: Takedowns increase the holder's Armor, Magic Resist, and Ability Power by @StatsPerTakedown@.

name: Cappa Juice
desc: The holder dons a Hat on each takedown. The holder gains @ADAPPerTakedown@% Attack Damage and Ability Power per Hat. On death lose @PercentHatLoss*100@% of all Hats. (Hats: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT_Item_Artifact_CappaJuice_NumHats@)

name: Artifactory
desc: At the start of each turn, your benched completed items transform into a random Artifact item. Gain @NumItems@ Artifact Anvil and @NumRemovers@ Removers.
